NVIDIA Maxine integration notice

OpenZoom includes only the MIT-licensed NVIDIA Maxine Video Effects SDK header
snapshot under Maxine-VFX-SDK/. See Maxine-VFX-SDK/LICENSE for that license.

The proprietary NVIDIA Video Effects runtime and models are not included in
this repository or OpenZoom distributions. Users may obtain that runtime
separately from NVIDIA and accept NVIDIA's applicable SDK terms:

https://www.nvidia.com/en-us/agreements/enterprise-software/nvidia-sdk-license-agreement/
https://www.nvidia.com/en-me/geforce/broadcasting/broadcast-sdk/resources/

OpenZoom's use of NVIDIA names is attribution only and does not imply NVIDIA
endorsement.
